'''âzh-g-th''' ('''zhagatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ziptie|ziptie]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ziptie|ziptie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-g-th
|-
! Lemma
| zhagatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhagathithi|zhagathithi]] || [[word:zhagathiji|zhagathiji]] || [[word:zhagathishi|zhagathishi]] || [[word:zhagathi|zhagathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhagathuthuth|zhagathuthuth]] || [[word:zhagathujuj|zhagathujuj]] || [[word:zhagathushush|zhagathushush]] || [[word:zhagath|zhagath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhagathuthu|zhagathuthu]] || [[word:zhagathuju|zhagathuju]] || [[word:zhagathushu|zhagathushu]] || [[word:zhagathu|zhagathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhagathufuth|zhagathufuth]] || [[word:zhagathufuj|zhagathufuj]] || [[word:zhagathufush|zhagathufush]] || [[word:zhagathuf|zhagathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhagathethe|zhagathethe]] || [[word:zhagatheje|zhagatheje]] || [[word:zhagatheshe|zhagatheshe]] || [[word:zhagathe|zhagathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhagathothoth|zhagathothoth]] || [[word:zhagathojoj|zhagathojoj]] || [[word:zhagathoshosh|zhagathoshosh]] || [[word:zhagath|zhagath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhagathotho|zhagathotho]] || [[word:zhagathojo|zhagathojo]] || [[word:zhagathosho|zhagathosho]] || [[word:zhagatho|zhagatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhagathofoth|zhagathofoth]] || [[word:zhagathofoj|zhagathofoj]] || [[word:zhagathofosh|zhagathofosh]] || [[word:zhagathof|zhagathof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻf|zhagathĂŻf]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻf|zhagathĂŻf]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻf|zhagathĂŻf]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻf|zhagathĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻfĂŻf|zhagathĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻfĂŻf|zhagathĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻfĂŻf|zhagathĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻfĂŻf|zhagathĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻf|zhagathĂŻf]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻf|zhagathĂŻf]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻf|zhagathĂŻf]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻf|zhagathĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻf|zhagathĂŻf]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻf|zhagathĂŻf]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻf|zhagathĂŻf]] || [[word:zhagathĂŻf|zhagathĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhagathĂŠthĂŠ|zhagathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhagathĂŠjĂŠ|zhagathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhagathĂŠshĂŠ|zhagathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhagathĂŠ|zhagathĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhagathathath|zhagathathath]] || [[word:zhagathajaj|zhagathajaj]] || [[word:zhagathashash|zhagathashash]] || [[word:zhagath|zhagath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhagathatha|zhagathatha]] || [[word:zhagathaja|zhagathaja]] || [[word:zhagathasha|zhagathasha]] || [[word:zhagatha|zhagatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhagathafath|zhagathafath]] || [[word:zhagathafaj|zhagathafaj]] || [[word:zhagathafash|zhagathafash]] || [[word:zhagathaf|zhagathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhagathasha|zhagathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhagathasha|gozhagathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhagathasha|gokizhagathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhagathnĂŒsha|zhagathnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhagathnknĂŒsha|gozhagathnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhagathnĂŒsha|gokizhagathnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhagathshĂ«sha|zhagathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhagathnkshĂ«sha|gozhagathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhagathshĂ«sha|gokizhagathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhagathrosha|zhagathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhagathnkrosha|gozhagathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhagathrosha|gokizhagathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhagathmusha|zhagathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhagathnkmusha|gozhagathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhagathmusha|gokizhagathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhagathsherasha|zhagathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhagathnksherasha|gozhagathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhagathsherasha|gokizhagathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhagathngasha|zhagathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhagathnkngasha|gozhagathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhagathngasha|gokizhagathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhagathyasha|zhagathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhagathnkyasha|gozhagathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhagathyasha|gokizhagathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhagathyamasha|zhagathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhagathnkyamasha|gozhagathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhagathyamasha|gokizhagathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhagathnĂŒshĂ«sha|zhagathnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhagathnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozhagathnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhagathnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizhagathnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhagathnĂŒrosha|zhagathnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhagathnknĂŒrosha|gozhagathnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhagathnĂŒrosha|gokizhagathnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhagathnĂŒmusha|zhagathnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhagathnknĂŒmusha|gozhagathnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhagathnĂŒmusha|gokizhagathnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhagathshĂ«nĂŒsha|zhagathshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhagathnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozhagathnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhagathshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizhagathshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhagathshĂ«rosha|zhagathshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhagathnkshĂ«rosha|gozhagathnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhagathshĂ«rosha|gokizhagathshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhagathshĂ«musha|zhagathshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhagathnkshĂ«musha|gozhagathnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhagathshĂ«musha|gokizhagathshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhagathronĂŒsha|zhagathronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhagathnkronĂŒsha|gozhagathnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhagathronĂŒsha|gokizhagathronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhagathroshĂ«sha|zhagathroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhagathnkroshĂ«sha|gozhagathnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhagathroshĂ«sha|gokizhagathroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhagathromusha|zhagathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhagathnkromusha|gozhagathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhagathromusha|gokizhagathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhagathmunĂŒsha|zhagathmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhagathnkmunĂŒsha|gozhagathnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhagathmunĂŒsha|gokizhagathmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhagathmushĂ«sha|zhagathmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhagathnkmushĂ«sha|gozhagathnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhagathmushĂ«sha|gokizhagathmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhagathmurosha|zhagathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhagathnkmurosha|gozhagathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhagathmurosha|gokizhagathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhagath|zhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zhĂŠgĂŠth|zhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhagath|hozhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozhĂŠgĂŠth|hozhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhagath|hohozhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhĂŠgĂŠth|hohozhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzhagath|nĂŒzhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzhĂŠgĂŠth|nĂŒzhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzhagath|nĂŒnĂŒzhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzhĂŠgĂŠth|nĂŒnĂŒzhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzhagath|nĂŻzhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzhĂŠgĂŠth|nĂŻzhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzhagath|nĂŻnĂŻzhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzhĂŠgĂŠth|nĂŻnĂŻzhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhagath|luzhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzhĂŠgĂŠth|luzhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhagath|luluzhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhĂŠgĂŠth|luluzhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhagath|lizhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizhĂŠgĂŠth|lizhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhagath|lilizhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhĂŠgĂŠth|lilizhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhagath|kozhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozhĂŠgĂŠth|kozhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhagath|kokozhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhĂŠgĂŠth|kokozhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhagath|kezhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezhĂŠgĂŠth|kezhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhagath|kekezhagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhĂŠgĂŠth|kekezhĂŠgĂŠth]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
